title: cyperus hilgendorfianus
intro: Cyperus hilgendorfianus, also known as the East African flat sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. Cyperus hilgendorfianus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional remedies.
